narrative:
Warren Township has 3,659 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
